# DocumentElement

**Protocol**

Represents an element that is contained within a document. Such elements can have identifiers that uniquely identify them within a document.

## Declaration

```swift
protocol DocumentElement : Hashable
```

## Implementing a document element

- **Document**: The document type this element is for.

## Document elements

- **BasicDocumentElementID**: A default implementation for a document element identifier.
- **DocumentElementID**: An identifier for an element in a document.
- **AssignableDocumentElement**: An element of an [doc://com.apple.Assignables/documentation/Assignables/AssignableDocument].
- **AssignedWorkDocumentElement**: An element of an [doc://com.apple.Assignables/documentation/Assignables/AssignedWorkDocument].

## Inherits From

- Equatable
- Hashable

## Inherited By

- AssignableDocumentElement
- AssignedWorkDocumentElement

## Conforming Types

- AssignableDocument.Page
- AssignableDocument.Question
- AssignableDocument.QuestionBox
- AssignedWorkDocument.Page
- AssignedWorkDocument.ScoreAnnotation
